steps.title: Use the concern signal
steps.content: The passage says healthy genetic diversity supports honey bee robustness, so a study result that raised concern must point to too little diversity. The blank needs a word meaning shortage or scarcity.

steps.title: Choose the shortage word
steps.content: Choice B means unnecessary repetition or excess, which goes the wrong direction. Choice C means difference or inequality, not lack. Choice D means a store or collection, which would suggest abundance. Paucity means scarcity, matching the reason for concern. The answer is A.
